common.name: Name
common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

login.subtitle: Sign in with your local account for M0 admin access.
login.registered_success: Your account has been created. Please log in.
login.password_reset_success: Your password has been changed. Please log in with your new password.

mfa_login.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa_login.totp_hint: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa_login.use_backup: Sign in with a backup code
mfa_login.use_totp: Sign in with an authenticator code

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.subtitle: Create an account to get started.
signup.not_available: Currently, accounts can only be created by an administrator.

find_id.title: Find Username
find_id.subtitle: Enter the email address you used to sign up.
find_id.result_found: This is the username registered with that email.
find_id.result_email_sent: Your full username has been sent to your email.
find_id.result_not_found: No account is registered with the email you entered.
find_id.not_available: Finding your username is not currently supported. Please contact your administrator.

find_password.title: Reset Password
find_password.subtitle: Enter your username and email, and we will send you a reset link.
find_password.result_sent: If the information matches, a password reset link will be sent to your email.
find_password.not_available: Password recovery is not currently supported. Please contact your administrator.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Please enter your new password.
reset_password.invalid_link: This link has expired or is invalid.
